guest.title: DRep Coordination Platform
guest.subtitle: Transparent, community-driven governance coordination for Cardano delegators and DReps. Follow governance actions, participate in discussions, and hold your representatives accountable.
guest.card1Desc: Follow active proposals from parameter changes to treasury withdrawals, all synced from the chain.
guest.card2Desc: Comment on proposals, see how your DRep plans to vote, and participate in the delegator clubhouse.
guest.card3Desc: Get your delegation history, see epoch deadlines, and never miss an important vote.
